titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on the state's governance of municipalities' exercise of authority, specifically concerning the LSS (Law on Support and Service for Persons with Disabilities).

titel: Follow-up on the crime prevention strategy "Barriers Against Crime."
ingress: The government has conducted a follow-up on its plan to combat crime. They believe that the new methods are helping to reduce recruitment into criminal gangs.

titel:
New political direction for a stronger film industry.

# A New Political Direction for a Stronger Film Industry

*   **A clear vision:** We need a clear vision for the future of the film industry.
*   **Increased funding:** We need to increase funding for film production and distribution.
*   **Support for independent filmmakers:** We need to provide more support for independent filmmakers.
*   **Promotion of diversity and inclusion:** We need to promote diversity and inclusion in the film industry.
*   **International collaboration:** We need to strengthen international collaboration in the film industry.

This new political direction will help to create a stronger and more vibrant film industry in Sweden. It will also help to promote Swedish culture and values around the world.

We believe that this new political direction is essential for the future of the film industry. We are confident that it will help to create a more sustainable and successful industry for years to come.
ingress: The government's proposal outlines new goals for national film policy. Based on the national cultural policy objectives, the national film policy should contribute to the creation and distribution of

titel: Bill: Tougher penalties for organised crime
ingress: The government proposes higher minimum sentences and expanded powers for covert surveillance in cases of organised crime.

titel: Sweden's foreign intelligence service
ingress: Sweden is establishing a new authority – Sweden's Foreign Intelligence Service (UND) – which is to begin operating on 1 January 2027. The government proposes a new law on how the authority may process personal data, together with consequential amendments to more than twenty other laws so that they work together with the new authority.

titel: City Council, City of Stockholm, 2026-06-17
ingress: The City Council of Stockholm has responded to questions regarding traffic changes, addressed a legal review of the Slussen area, and provided feedback on proposals concerning how personal data can be used to prevent crime.

titel: Stronger protection for the independence of courts and judges
ingress: The government wants to strengthen the courts' independence from political influence through a new, consolidated law on courts and judges. The National Courts Administration becomes more independent and is renamed the Courts Board, and clearer safeguards are introduced for how judges are appointed and can be removed from office. Most of the rules are proposed to take effect on 1 April 2027.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Agency's report on the Swedish Migration Agency's controls of work permits – a high risk of errors and abuse.

titel: Youth Policy Document
ingress: The government has published a report on the well-being of young people in Sweden today. The goal is for all young people to thrive, be able to influence society, and have a secure future.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on infiltration within the government.
ingress: The Swedish National Audit Office has investigated how three government agencies are working to prevent infiltration, which refers to attempts by external parties to improperly influence the agencies. The findings indicate that the agencies

titel: Hearing and temporary transfer in arrest warrant cases
ingress: The government wants to amend the rules on how Sweden surrenders wanted persons under a European or Nordic arrest warrant, in order to clarify them and align them with the case law of the EU Court of Justice. Among other things, a wanted person should be able to be heard or temporarily transferred for trial, and in certain cases the issuing country's consent will be required. The amendments are proposed to apply from 1 December 2026.

titel: Denied Forced Care – Found Dead in the Snow
ingress: A mentally ill 28-year-old, Lina Bryant, was refused compulsory psychiatric care and made to leave in the middle of the night – shortly afterwards she was found dead in the snow in Tanum municipality, Sweden. Despite being in a psychotic state and warnings from her family, she received no help. Her mother is now demanding change.

titel: Attempted Decapitation Occurred in Belfast
ingress: A man – reported to be a Scottish man in his 40s, Stephen Ogilvie – was the target of an attempted beheading on an open street in north Belfast. A Sudanese man has been charged with attempted murder. The attack took place in a deprived area with a long history of violence and tensions over migration.

titel: Saint Peter of Sävsjön Became the Pope of Crewe
ingress: Ten members of a Shia Muslim sect have been charged in the United Kingdom with offences including human trafficking, forced marriage and rape. The sect – The Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light – previously had its headquarters in Sävsjön outside Hällefors in Sweden, where locals remember the members as extremely secretive.

ingress: The government wants to eliminate the system of special accounts at the Payment Agency. The purpose is for the agency to focus solely on preventing incorrect payments of money.

ingress: The government wants to introduce a new law to prevent criminals from recruiting young people online. Those who own the digital platforms should be able to quickly be compelled to remove harmful content.

ingress: The government proposes allocating new funds in the 2026 budget to assist Ukraine with military equipment, and to support Swedish households and businesses facing high energy and fuel prices.

titel: National Planning for Transport Infrastructure 2026–2037
ingress: The government has established long-term plans for how roads and railways in Sweden will function between the years 2026 and 2037. The plan focuses on investing wisely in transportation and making the system more environmentally friendly.

titel:
Requirements for the case management systems of municipal land surveying authorities.

# Krav på kommunala lantmäterimyndigheters ärendehanteringssystem

## Inledning

Detta dokument beskriver kraven på ärendehanteringssystem som används av kommunala lantmäterimyndigheter. Syftet är att säkerställa en effektiv, transparent och rättssäker hantering av lantmäterifrågor.

## Allmänna krav

*   Systemet ska vara användarvänligt och lätt att lära sig.
*   Systemet ska vara säkert och skydda känslig information.
*   Systemet ska vara tillgängligt för alla berörda parter, inklusive allmänheten.
*   Systemet ska vara kompatibelt med andra system som används av kommunen.
*   Systemet ska vara skalbart för att kunna hantera framtida behov.

## Specifika krav

*   Systemet ska kunna hantera alla typer av lantmäterifrågor, inklusive fastighetsbildning, samfälligheter och servitut.
*   Systemet ska kunna hantera alla steg i ärendeprocessen, från inledande ansökan till slutgiltigt beslut.
*   Systemet ska kunna generera alla nödvändiga dokument, inklusive ansökningar, beslut och protokoll.
*   Systemet ska kunna spåra alla åtgärder som vidtas i ett ärende.
*   Systemet ska kunna generera rapporter och statistik om ärendehanteringen.
*   Systemet ska kunna integreras med andra system, såsom geografiska informationssystem (GIS) och fastighetsregister.

## Säkerhet

*   Systemet ska vara skyddat mot obehörig åtkomst.
*   Systemet ska ha en robust backup- och återställningsmekanism.
*   Systemet ska vara skyddat mot virus och annan skadlig programvara.
*   Systemet ska ha en revisionslogg som registrerar alla ändringar som görs i systemet.

## Tillgänglighet

*   Systemet ska vara tillgängligt dygnet runt, sju dagar i veckan.
*   Systemet ska vara tillgängligt från alla typer av enheter, inklusive datorer, surfplattor och smartphones.
*   Systemet ska vara tillgängligt för personer med funktionsnedsättningar.

## Kompatibilitet

*   Systemet ska vara kompatibelt med alla operativsystem som används av kommunen.
*   Systemet ska vara kompatibelt med alla webbläsare som används av kommunen.
*   Systemet ska vara kompatibelt med alla andra system som används av kommunen.

## Skalbarhet

*   Systemet ska kunna hantera en ökning av antalet ärenden.
*   Systemet ska kunna hantera en ökning av antalet användare.
*   Systemet ska kunna hantera en ökning av datamängden.

## Integration

*   Systemet ska kunna integreras med GIS-system.
*   Systemet ska kunna integreras med fastighetsregister.
*   Systemet ska kunna integreras med andra system som används av kommunen.

## Slutord

Dessa krav är avsedda att vara en vägledning för utvecklingen och implementeringen av ärendehanteringssystem för kommunala lantmäterimyndigheter. Det är viktigt att kraven anpassas till de specifika behoven hos varje kommun.

titel: Evaluation of the State's Borrowing and Debt Management 2021–2025.
ingress: The government has investigated how Sweden has managed its loans between 2021 and 2025. The results show that the state's debt decreased during part of the period, but that it now costs more to have loans due to higher prices in society.

titel:
Stricter rules for young offenders.

# Skärpta regler för unga lagöverträdare

Nya åtgärder har införts för att hantera ungdomar som begår brott.

*   Syftet är att minska brottsligheten bland unga.
*   Åtgärderna inkluderar:
    *   Ökad övervakning.
    *   Striktare straff.
    *   Fler möjligheter till rehabilitering.

Dessa åtgärder är tänkta att ge unga som begår brott en andra chans och att hjälpa dem att återintegreras i samhället.

**Viktigt att notera:** Det är viktigt att komma ihåg att dessa åtgärder är till för att hjälpa unga, inte att straffa dem.

För mer information, besök: www.exempel.se
ingress: The government proposes stricter penalties for young people who commit crimes. The proposal includes, among other things, that children as young as 13 years old can be held responsible for serious crimes for a period of five years.

titel:
Simplifications in hunting legislation.

# Förenklingar i jaktlagstiftningen

Denna text beskriver föreslagna förenklingar i jaktlagstiftningen.

*   **Mål:** Att göra jaktlagstiftningen mer lättillgänglig och förståelig.
*   **Förslag:**
    *   Förenkla regelverket kring jaktprov.
    *   Tydligare definitioner av vad som utgör olaga jakt.
    *   Minska byråkratin kring licenser och tillstånd.
*   **Fördelar:**
    *   Ökad förståelse för lagstiftningen bland jägare.
    *   Minskad risk för felaktigheter och misstolkningar.
    *   Effektivare administration.
*   **Utmaningar:**
    *   Att hitta en balans mellan förenkling och tydlighet.
    *   Att säkerställa att förenklingarna inte urholkar skyddet för vilt och miljö.

Denna process är viktig för att säkerställa en hållbar och rättvis jakt.

titel:
Activity Requirements for Recipients of Social Assistance

# Activity Requirements for Recipients of Social Assistance

This document outlines the activity requirements that apply to individuals receiving social assistance.

*   **Purpose:** The purpose of these requirements is to encourage and support recipients in actively seeking employment or other means of self-sufficiency.

*   **General Requirements:**

    *   Recipients are expected to actively seek employment or participate in other activities that promote self-sufficiency.
    *   Recipients must cooperate with the social services agency and follow any instructions or recommendations provided.
    *   Recipients must report any changes in their circumstances that may affect their eligibility for social assistance.

*   **Specific Requirements:**

    *   **Job Search:** Recipients are typically required to demonstrate a consistent and documented effort to find employment. This may include applying for jobs, attending interviews, and participating in job training programs.
    *   **Education and Training:** Recipients may be required to participate in education or training programs to improve their skills and qualifications.
    *   **Community Service:** In some cases, recipients may be required to perform community service as part of their activity plan.

*   **Exceptions:**

    *   Exceptions to these requirements may be made for individuals who are unable to work due to illness, disability, or other extenuating circumstances.

*   **Consequences of Non-Compliance:**

    *   Failure to comply with the activity requirements may result in a reduction or termination of social assistance benefits.

*   **Contact Information:**

    *   For more information about the activity requirements, please contact the local social services agency.

titel:
Measures to Enhance the Functionality of Cash

# Measures to Enhance the Functionality of Cash

*   Ensure the availability of cash for all citizens and businesses.
*   Promote the acceptance of cash by merchants.
*   Reduce the costs associated with handling cash.
*   Improve the security of cash transactions.
*   Educate the public about the benefits of using cash.
*   Support innovation in cash-based payment systems.
*   Maintain the integrity of the cash supply.
*   Monitor the use of cash and its impact on the economy.
*   Collaborate with stakeholders to address challenges related to cash.
*   Regularly review and update policies related to cash.

titel:
A Fair Grading System

# Ett likvärdigt betygssystem
# A Fair Grading System

För att skapa ett rättvisare betygssystem är det viktigt att:
To create a fairer grading system, it is important to:

*   **Tydlighet:**
*   **Clarity:**
*   **Objektivitet:**
*   **Objectivity:**
*   **Transparens:**
*   **Transparency:**

Detta innebär att kriterierna för bedömning måste vara tydligt definierade och kommunicerade till studenterna. Bedömningen ska vara objektiv och baserad på tydliga kriterier, inte på subjektiva åsikter. Slutligen måste systemet vara transparent, så att studenterna förstår hur deras betyg sätts.
This means that the criteria for assessment must be clearly defined and communicated to students. The assessment should be objective and based on clear criteria, not on subjective opinions. Finally, the system must be transparent, so that students understand how their grades are determined.

titel:
Simplified rules for modifying a building.

# Simplified rules for modifying a building

These are simplified rules that apply when making changes to a building.

*   **Planning permission:** In some cases, planning permission may not be required for minor modifications.
*   **Building regulations:** Building regulations must still be followed, even for minor modifications.
*   **Notification:** It may be necessary to notify the local authority of certain modifications.

**Examples of modifications that may not require planning permission:**

*   Replacing windows or doors with similar ones.
*   Adding a small extension to the rear of a property.
*   Making internal alterations.

**Examples of modifications that may require planning permission:**

*   Building a new extension.
*   Changing the roof of a property.
*   Demolishing a building.

It is important to check with the local authority to determine whether planning permission is required for any proposed modifications.

**Contact information:**

[Local authority website](https://www.example.com)

titel:
Sweden's military support to Ukraine.

# Sveriges militära stöd till Ukraina

Sverige har under flera år gett stöd till Ukraina, både ekonomiskt och militärt. Detta stöd har ökat sedan Rysslands invasion i februari 2022.

*   **Ekonomiskt stöd:** Sverige har bidragit med flera miljarder kronor i ekonomiskt stöd till Ukraina.
*   **Militärt stöd:** Sverige har levererat vapen, ammunition och annan militär utrustning till Ukraina.

Sveriges stöd till Ukraina är en viktig del av landets ansträngningar för att stödja Ukrainas suveränitet och territoriella integritet.

## Exempel på svenskt militärt stöd till Ukraina:

*   2022: Sverige levererade 5000 hjälmar, 2000 skyddsvästar, 1000 fältförbandslådor och 1000 soldatutrustningar.
*   2023: Sverige levererade 150 stridsvagnar, 500 pansarfordon och 1000 luftvärnsrobotar.
*   2024: Sverige planerar att leverera ytterligare militär utrustning till Ukraina.

Sveriges stöd till Ukraina är en långsiktig investering i säkerheten och stabiliteten i Europa.

titel:
Stricter requirements for Swedish citizenship.

# Skärpta krav för svenskt medborgarskap
## Bakgrund
Regeringen har beslutat att skärpa kraven för att bli svensk medborgare. Detta innebär bland annat att kraven på språkkunskaper och kunskap om det svenska samhället höjs.

## Nya krav
De nya kraven innebär bland annat följande:

*   **Högre krav på språkkunskaper:** För att bli svensk medborgare krävs nu en högre nivå i svenska språket, både i tal och skrift.
*   **Ökad kunskap om det svenska samhället:** De som ansöker om svenskt medborgarskap måste visa att de har goda kunskaper om det svenska samhället, inklusive dess historia, kultur och värderingar.
*   **Striktare krav på ekonomisk självförsörjning:** För att bli svensk medborgare måste man kunna försörja sig ekonomiskt och inte vara beroende av socialbidrag.
*   **Inga undantag för vissa grupper:** Tidigare har det funnits vissa undantag från kraven för vissa grupper, till exempel personer som har arbetat i Sverige under en längre tid. Dessa undantag har nu tagits bort.

## Syfte
Syftet med de skärpta kraven är att säkerställa att de som blir svenska medborgare har goda kunskaper om det svenska språket och samhället, samt att de kan försörja sig ekonomiskt.

## Kritik
De skärpta kraven har mötts av kritik från flera håll. Vissa menar att kraven är för höga och att de kommer att göra det svårare för människor att bli svenska medborgare. Andra menar att kraven är nödvändiga för att säkerställa att de som blir svenska medborgare är väl integrerade i det svenska samhället.

## Framtiden
Det är ännu oklart hur de skärpta kraven kommer att påverka antalet personer som blir svenska medborgare. Det är dock troligt att antalet kommer att minska.

titel:
Police Use of AI for Real-Time Facial Recognition

# Police Use of AI for Real-Time Facial Recognition

This document discusses the use of artificial intelligence (AI) by the police for real-time facial recognition.

*   **Benefits:**
    *   Improved efficiency in identifying suspects.
    *   Enhanced public safety.
    *   Reduced crime rates.

*   **Risks:**
    *   Potential for bias and discrimination.
    *   Privacy concerns.
    *   Risk of misidentification.

*   **Ethical considerations:**
    *   Transparency and accountability.
    *   Data security and privacy.
    *   Human oversight and control.

The use of AI for real-time facial recognition by the police raises important ethical and legal questions. It is crucial to carefully consider the potential benefits and risks before implementing such technology.

---

For more information, please visit: [www.example.com](www.example.com)

ingress: The government wants to change the rules regarding how much people can borrow for their homes and how much they have to pay back each month. The aim is to make it easier for more people to buy a home without creating risks for the economy.

ingress: The government wants to amend several laws to make it easier and faster to expand renewable energy production in Sweden. The proposal aims to help comply with EU regulations and reduce bureaucratic hurdles in obtaining permits for, for exam

titel: Report on the operations of the International Monetary Fund in 2025.
ingress: The text describes what the international organization IMF will be doing in 2025 and what the Swedish government considers important in their work. It focuses on creating a stable global economy.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on the state's efforts in handling deceased estates – investigation, administration, and distribution.
ingress: The government plans to simplify and expedite the handling of estates by introducing digital solutions, among other measures. This follows a proposal from the Swedish National Audit Office, which reviews how the state operates.

titel: Reforming waste legislation to increase material recycling.
ingress: Sweden aims to amend waste management laws to improve material recycling. The proposal would increase the responsibility of companies for their own waste and simplify the regulations for municipalities.

titel: Modernization of the Swedish Tax Agency's control tools.
ingress: The government wants to change the laws so that the Swedish Tax Agency (Skatteverket) can use modern technology to audit companies. This means that they will be able to more easily access digital information, even if it is stored in cloud s

titel: Identity requirements for property registration and measures to prevent circumvention of the condominium law.
ingress: The government wants to change the laws to prevent fraud in real estate transactions and make it more difficult to cheat during the conversion of rental properties to owner-occupied housing. The proposal would require individuals to provide

titel: Enhanced security measures for the transfer of real estate.
ingress: The government wants to amend the law to prevent critical properties from being sold to individuals or companies that could harm Sweden's security. Starting in July 2026, checks must be carried out before important buildings or land change

titel: Exchange of information in the supplementary tax report and supplementary procedures for the supplementary tax assessment for companies in large groups.
ingress: The government proposes new regulations requiring large companies and international corporations to share tax information with each other. The purpose is to make it easier to verify that large companies are paying the correct amount of tax

titel: An exception in the coupon tax law for foreign states.
ingress: The government wants to amend the law so that foreign states and similar organizations are exempt from paying taxes on dividends received from Swedish companies. This applies to countries that cooperate with Sweden on tax matters.

titel: Security detention – a new, indefinite form of deprivation of liberty.
ingress: The government's proposal suggests the introduction of a new, indefinite form of deprivation of liberty, to be called "security detention." This measure should be applicable to individuals who have co

titel: Supplementary provisions to the EU regulation on sustainability ratings.
ingress: New regulations from the EU are designed to make it easier to identify which companies are genuinely environmentally friendly. The purpose is to prevent companies from making false claims about their environmental impact, a practice known a

titel: A language requirement in elderly care.
ingress: Starting in July 2026, there will be requirements for staff in elderly care to have sufficient proficiency in Swedish to perform their jobs. The government wants to amend the law to ensure that those working with the elderly have the necess

titel: A substitute you can trust.
ingress: The government aims to make things safer and better for individuals who have a legal guardian or conservator. The goal is to provide better support for those who need it, and to make the rules clearer.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on labor law conditions in public procurement.
ingress: The government intends to make it easier to ensure that workers have good working conditions when the state purchases services. They are now providing increased support to the Swedish Agency for Public Procurement (Upphandlingsmyndigheten)

titel: Future Data Protection at the Swedish Tax Agency, Customs Agency, and Enforcement Agency.
ingress: The government wants to change the laws regarding how the Swedish Tax Agency (Skatteverket), the Customs Agency (Tullverket), and the National Enforcement Agency (Kronofogden) handle personal data. The purpose is for these agencies to be ab

titel: New rules for labor immigration.
ingress: The government wants to change the rules for working in Sweden. The goal is to make it more difficult to exploit undocumented labor, while making it easier for skilled professionals to come to the country.

titel: Stricter requirements for public defenders and increased competence requirements for interpreters in immigration cases.
ingress: It is crucial for legal certainty that the work of public defenders maintains a high quality. It must be ensured that public defenders possess the necessary competence for their assignments, particula

titel: 2025 Report for Companies with State Ownership.
ingress: In the document, the government provides an overview of the management of the state's ownership in companies and the operations of the companies managed by the Government Offices at the turn of the ye

titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on higher education institutions' efforts to prevent dropouts in vocational training programs.
ingress: In this document, the government presents its assessment of the observations, conclusions, and recommendations made by the Swedish National Audit Agency (Riksrevisionen) in its review report, "Higher

titel: Supplementary provisions to the EU Battery Regulation.
ingress: The proposal includes legislative changes that complement the EU regulation on batteries. These changes include, among other things, that a market surveillance authority may: * require economic operat

titel: An improved model for calculating presumptive rent.
ingress: The government proposes changes to the rules regarding rents for newly constructed apartments, known as "presumptive rents." The purpose is to create better conditions for building new rental apartmen

titel: A basic deduction in the risk tax.
ingress: The proposal suggests introducing a basic deduction in the law regarding the risk tax for credit institutions. The proposal stipulates that a Swedish credit institution, or a foreign credit institutio

titel: An effective criminal law framework for protecting government subsidies to businesses.
ingress: The government's proposal suggests the introduction of a law specifically addressing offenses related to subsidies. This law would provide special criminal protection for state support provided to com

titel: Report on the allocation of funds from the General Legacy Fund during the 2024 fiscal year.
ingress: This document provides an overview of the management of the General Legacy Fund and a report on how the Legacy Fund Delegation has distributed funds from the fund during 2024. Furthermore, the governm

titel: Increased opportunities for sharing tasks within the Police Authority.
ingress: A crucial aspect of the Swedish Police Authority's intelligence operations involves gathering, processing, and analyzing information. This information is often vital for the Police Authority to preven

titel: Criminalization of virginity tests, virginity certificates, and hymenoplasty.
ingress: In Sweden, practices such as virginity checks, virginity certificates, and procedures aimed at simulating virginity occur both within and outside the healthcare system. These practices can lead to ser

titel: Increased property tax for wind turbines.
ingress: The proposal suggests increasing the property tax on wind turbines from 0.2% to 0.5% of the assessed value. Property tax is payable on properties that, during the property assessment process, are clas

titel: Defense Industry Strategy for a Stronger Sweden: Innovation, Production, and Collaboration.
ingress: The government has developed a defense industry strategy. In this strategy, the government outlines its approach to strengthening Sweden's defense industrial base by promoting an innovative and compet

titel: A new remedy in the data protection law and the criminal data law.
ingress: The government wants to make it easier to obtain a response when the Swedish Authority for Data Protection (IMY) is too slow in handling complaints about personal data. After three months, individuals should be able to demand an update on t

titel: Enhanced protection for certain elected officials, and clearer internal controls in municipalities and regions.
ingress: The government wants to amend the law so that municipalities and regions are obligated to protect their politicians from threats and violence. They also want municipalities and regions to improve their ability to detect errors and fraud in

titel: Ban on bottom trawling in marine protected areas.
ingress: The government wants to ban bottom trawling in certain protected marine areas in order to protect nature. The proposal would prohibit the use of large nets dragged along the seabed in areas that are important for the environment.

titel: Improved conditions for the tourism industry regarding the small-scale production of alcoholic beverages.
ingress: The government wants to make it easier for small producers to sell alcohol directly on their farms. The aim is to help tourism and local businesses grow.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Agency's report on "Industriklivet."
ingress: The Swedish National Audit Agency has identified shortcomings in how the state supports the industrial sector's transition to a climate-friendly economy through the "Industriklivet" project. The government will now review how the support me

titel: It's about life – a national strategy for mental health and suicide prevention.
ingress: The government has developed a plan to improve people's mental health and prevent suicide in Sweden between 2025 and 2034. The plan aims to help the entire society work together to ensure that everyone feels better.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on the achievement of the goals of the housing allowance.
ingress: The Swedish National Audit Office has reviewed whether the housing allowance helps to reduce overcrowding and poverty. The government has read the report but has decided not to make any new changes at this time.

titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on social security contributions for foreign income.
ingress: The government has responded to a report indicating a significant risk of incorrect payments being made from social security when individuals have income from other countries. Authorities will now collaborate more closely to prevent these e
